title: Resume Insights Agent — Suggest-Only Tailoring
description: Compare resume vs job description: keyword gaps, bullet rewrite suggestions, section placement advice. NEVER modify user PDF or stored resume — suggestions only. Uses OpenRouter.

userStories.title: Job description field on applications
userStories.description: Add optional job_description: str | None (max 8000 chars) to application schemas and DB writes. Extension passes best-effort JD text on save. DetailPanel textarea for manual paste.
userStories.notes: job_description in schemas, extension extraction, DetailPanel textarea. Commit 19dac5d.

userStories.title: Resume insights service and API endpoint
userStories.description: POST /api/applications/{app_id}/resume-insights (5/hour). Requires job_description and resume_text else 422. OpenRouter returns JSON: keyword_gaps, section_suggestions, bullet_rewrites, overall_summary. Cache on application as resume_insights + resume_insights_at.
userStories.notes: POST /api/applications/{app_id}/resume-insights with OpenRouter complete_json and cache. Commit 0447174.

userStories.title: Frontend — Resume Insights section in DetailPanel
userStories.description: ResumeInsightsSection inline in DetailPanelBody: JD paste, Analyze button, display gaps/rewrites/suggestions. Disclaimer: 'Suggestions only — we never edit your resume file.' Cached insights with Refresh. Direct lucide subpath imports.
userStories.notes: ResumeInsightsSection in DetailPanelBody, generateResumeInsights API, frontend build passes. Commit 456af93.

userStories.title: Tests for resume insights endpoint
userStories.description: backend/tests/test_resume_insights.py: 401, 422 no JD, 422 no resume, 200 success (mock complete_json), 503 no key. loop_scope session, real MongoDB.
userStories.notes: test_resume_insights.py — 5 tests, OpenRouter mocked, loop_scope session. Commit b7897f8.
